basic_details.job_title: EPFO Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 74 Auditor, Assistant Audit Officer and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Audit Posts (Deputy Director (Audit), Assistant Director (Audit), Assistant Audit Officer, Auditor)
basic_details.short_information: Employees' Provident Fund Organisation (EPFO) Audit Posts (Deputy Director (Audit), Assistant Director (Audit), Assistant Audit Officer, Auditor) Notification 2026 has been released on 16 June 2026 on the official website of EPFO. A total of 74 vacancies have been announced through the EPFO Audit Posts Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 56 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation preferably B.Com, SAS examination conducted by IA&AD, Experience in Audit and Accounts of Public Funds
qualification.details: Deputy Director (Audit): Employees of EPFO/Central/State Government having completed Graduation preferably B.Com, passed SAS examination, holding analogous posts or 5 years in Level-10 or 7 years in Level-8 or 8 years in Level-6, possessing experience in Audit and Accounts. Assistant Director (Audit): Employees of EPFO/Central/State Government holding analogous posts or 3 years regular service in Level-7 or 5 years in Level-6 or 7 years in Level-6, possessing experience in Accounts/Audit of Public Funds. Assistant Audit Officer (AAO): Officers of EPFO/Central/State Government holding analogous posts or 5 years in Level-6 or 7 years in Level-6, possessing experience in Accounts/Audit of Public Funds. Auditor: Officers of EPFO/Central/State Government holding analogous posts or 5 years in Level-5, possessing experience in Accounts/Audit of Public Funds.

salary_details.pay_scale: Level-11 to Level-6 of 7th CPC Pay Matrix
salary_details.details: Deputy Director (Audit): Level-11 Assistant Director (Audit): Level-10 Assistant Audit Officer (AAO): Level-7 Auditor: Level-6

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for EPFO Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.epfindia.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 14-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for EPFO Audit Posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the EPFO Audit Posts is 14th August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for EPFO Audit Posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 74 vacancies announced for various Audit Posts including Deputy Director (Audit), Assistant Director (Audit), Assistant Audit Officer, and Auditor.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility criteria for Deputy Director (Audit) post?
faq.answer: For the Deputy Director (Audit) post, candidates must be employees of EPFO/Central/State Government, hold a Graduation degree (preferably B.Com), have passed the SAS examination, and possess relevant experience in Audit and Accounts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applying to these EPFO posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the advertised posts is 56 years. There is no mention of age relaxation in the provided data.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for EPFO Audit Posts recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The salary will be based on the 7th CPC Pay Matrix, ranging from Level-11 for Deputy Director (Audit) down to Level-6 for Auditor.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for EPFO Audit Posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these deputation posts?
faq.answer: The selection process is based on deputation, which will be determined by the candidate's eligibility, service records, and Annual Performance Appraisal Reports (APARs).

faq.question: Q9. Which government organizations are eligible for deputation?
faq.answer: Employees from EPFO, Central Government, and State Government organizations are eligible to apply for these deputation posts.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of EPFO, which is https://www.epfindia.gov.in.
